judge_reason: Description A claims specific visual elements (hole punches, a distribution list with checkmarks, and the name 'Miss Gandy' in a list) that are not mentioned in Description B, which instead describes handwritten initials, numbers, and stamped labels as the only visual content.
original_image_tags: Standard Form 64. The document has three hole punches at the top. The right margin contains a distribution list with checkmarks next to "Mr. Tolson" and "Mr. E. A. Tamm". The name "Miss Gandy" is visible at the bottom of this list.
